title: Python Basics
body: Python is a popular high level programming language known for readability.

title: Python Dictionaries
body: A dictionary in Python stores key value pairs and allows fast lookups.

title: Learning JavaScript
body: JavaScript runs in the browser and powers interactive web pages.

title: Introduction to Databases
body: Databases store structured data and support queries like search and filter.

title: Search Engines Explained
body: A search engine indexes documents and returns ranked results for a query.

title: Machine Learning Overview
body: Machine learning models learn patterns from data to make predictions.

title: Data Structures 101
body: Common data structures include arrays, linked lists, trees and hash maps.

title: Web Development Guide
body: Web development involves building websites using HTML CSS and JavaScript.

title: Understanding APIs
body: An API lets two software systems communicate using defined requests.

title: SQL for Beginners
body: SQL is a language used to query and manage relational databases.
